# MuleSoft Salesforce Composite Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.0) of Salesforce Composite Connector documentation.
> See [Salesforce Composite Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-composite-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce Composite Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Salesforce Composite Connector 3.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-composite-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Salesforce Composite Connector 3.0 - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-composite-connector/latest/salesforce-composite-connector-examples.md)
- [Salesforce Composite Connector 3.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-composite-connector/latest/salesforce-composite-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Salesforce Composite Connector 3.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-composite-connector/latest/salesforce-composite-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Salesforce Composite Connector to Version 3.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-composite-connector/latest/salesforce-composite-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
